    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract void
    Enemy.updateMovement(Position player_position, Set<Position> occupied_positions)
    updateMovement() updates the position of the enemy by a single tick.
    void
    Goblin.updateMovement(Position player_position, Set<Position> occupied_positions)
    Moves the goblin 1 tile towards the player
    void
    Ogre.updateMovement(Position player_position, Set<Position> occupied_positions)
    Updates the ogre's movement by attempting to advance along its patrol route.

    Constructors in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies with parameters of type Position
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Goblin(Board board, Position pos)
    Creates a goblin at the given starting position on the board.
     
    Ogre(Board board, Position... route)
    Creates an ogre that follows the given patrol route.
     
    Ogre(Board board, Position first_position, Direction direction)
    Creates an ogre that patrols back and forth in a straight line.
